subcodes.first_line: In these days when the clamor of the ungodly hath risen from most quarters, and souls that have joined partners with God seek to extinguish the light of divine unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ایام که ضوضاء مشرکین از اکثر جهات مرتفع و نفوس مشرکه در اطفای نور احدیه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @the power of words; of speech, @wisdom [hikmat]
